mapper.select: SELECT id, community_name, community_code, province, city, district, address, contact_person, contact_phone, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_community WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, community_name, community_code, province, city, district, address, contact_person, contact_phone, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_community WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, community_name, community_code, province, city, district, address, contact_person, contact_phone, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_community WHERE community_code = #{communityCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_community (community_name, community_code, province, city, district, address, contact_person, contact_phone, status) VALUES (#{communityName}, #{communityCode}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_community SET community_name = #{communityName}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address = #{address}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
